HONEST EXPECTED OUTCOME (paint-over forbidden): all 4 falsifiers stay NOT_OBSERVED or CONDITIONAL; demotion precedents R34/R36/R42/R43 preserved; R44 stays CONDITIONAL conjecture exactly as fanout #4 left it.
